description.value:
A lightweight mace studded with iron spikes, designed to punch through mail and gouge flesh. Quick enough to be wielded with other weapons, and vicious on a follow-up strike.

Training Levels

LevelProperties
UntrainedOne-Handed, Melee d4, Bludgeoning
BasicOne-Handed, Light, Melee d6, Bludgeoning or Piercing, Punch, Wound
MasterOne-Handed, Light, Melee d6, Bludgeoning or Piercing, Punch, Wound, follow-up strike
Master PerkAs a bonus action, make an additional attack with this weapon at disadvantage. If it hits, the attack deals 2d6 damage instead of the normal damage dice.

rmeData.masterPerk: As a bonus action, make an additional attack at disadvantage. If it hits, it deals 2d6 damage instead of the normal damage dice.
